evidences.content: # binance\_klines: Get kline/candlestick data from Binance In daroczig/binancer: API Client to 'Binance' View source: R/binance.R | | | --- | | binance\_klines | R Documentation | Get kline/candlestick data from BinanceDescription Get kline/candlestick data from Binance Usage ``` binance_klines( symbol, interval = c("1m", "3m", "5m", "15m", "30m", "1h", "2h", "4h", "6h", "8h", "12h", "1d", "3d", "1w", "1M"), limit, start_time, end_time ) ``` Arguments | | | --- | | `symbol` | string | | `interval` | enum | | `limit` | optional int | | `start_time` | optional POSIX timestamp | | `end_time` | optional POSIX timestamp | Value `data.table` with open-high-low-close values Examples ``` ## Not run: binance_klines('ETHUSDT') binance_klines('ETHUSDT', interval = '1h', limit = 247) [...] binance_klines('ETHUSDT', interval = '1h', limit = 247) binance_klines('ETHUSDT', interval = '1h', start_time = '2018-01-01', end_time = '2018-01-08') ## End(Not run) ``` daroczig/binancer documentation built on March 5, 2024, 4:28 a.m. Related to binance\_klines in daroczig/binancer... daroczig/binancer index README.md R Package Documentation rdrr.io home R language documentation Run R code online Browse...

evidences.title: Binance.US API Documentation: Introduction
evidences.content: + Previously some requests failed if the `startTime` == `endTime`. + Now, all API requests that accept `startTime` and `endTime` allow the parameters to be equal. This applies to the following requests: - `GET /api/v3/aggTrades` - `GET /api/v3/klines` - `GET /api/v3/allOrderList` - `GET /api/v3/allOrders` - `GET /api/v3/myTrades` Changes to Filter Evaluation: + Previous behavior: `LOT_SIZE` and `MARKET_LOT_SIZE` required that (`quantity` - `minQty`) % `stepSize` == 0. + New behavior changed to: (`quantity` % `stepSize`) == 0. Bug fix with reverse `MARKET` orders (i.e. `MARKET` using `quoteOrderQty`): [...] > Response ``` [{" a ": 874844, " p ": "0.00379700 ", " q ": "0.05000000 ", " f ": 981493, " l ": 981493, " T ": 1637128220041, " m ": true, " M ": true}] ``` `GET /api/v3/aggTrades` Use this endpoint to get compressed, aggregate trades. Trades that fill at the same time, from the same order, with the same price, will have the quantity aggregated. Please note the maximum limit is 1,000 trades. Weight: 1 Parameters: | Name | Type | Mandatory | Description | --- --- | | symbol | STRING | YES | | fromId | LONG | NO | ID to get aggregate trades from INCLUSIVE | | startTime | LONG...

evidences.content: `# import requests import json import pandas as pd import numpy as np import datetime as dt frequency = input("Please enter the frequency (1m/5m/30m/.../1h/6h/1d/ : ") def get_bars(symbol, interval=frequency): root_url = ' url = root_url + '?symbol=' + symbol + '&interval=' + interval data = json.loads(requests.get(url).text) df = pd.DataFrame(data) df.columns = ['open_time', 'o', 'h', 'l', 'c', 'v', 'close_time', 'qav', 'num_trades', 'taker_base_vol', 'taker_quote_vol', 'ignore'] df.index = [dt.datetime.fromtimestamp(x / 1000.0) for x in df.close_time] return df btcusdt = get_bars('BTCUSDT') ethusdt = get_bars('ETHUSDT') df0=pd.DataFrame(btcusdt) df0.to_csv('_btcusdt.csv') df1=pd.DataFrame(ethusdt) df1.to_csv('_ethusdt.csv')` Can anyone help me to optimize it? ETH may pull back to $2500 in the short term, but it will aim ...
evidences.content: Key conclusion: - As market capitalization expands, the rate of increase decreases each round, but each round still maintains several times the market. - If we take the current low of $2,500 as a benchmark, 3 times that would be $7,500, and 4 times that would be $10,000, which is highly consistent with the $7,000-$9,000 range. Second, the current pullback is only 36%, far from entering the "deep bear market" range. As of November 26, 2025, the price of ETH was around $3,000, a pullback of about 36% from its all-time high of $4,909. Compare with historical drawdowns: - Drawdown after the 2018 bull market: -94% - Post-2022 bull market pullback: -82% - Current pullback: -36%, still within the normal correction range and has not yet entered the oversold phase.
